refs.note: "quod ad te etiam scripseram" — Cicero explicitly notes he had already written to Brutus about the postponement of the priestly elections; this references an earlier letter in the Ad Brutum corpus, now lost or not separately transmitted.
"ut ante scripsi" — Cicero had urged Brutus to come into Italy in 1.12.2 (written earlier the same month); here he reissues the same appeal explicitly flagging the earlier letter.
